title: India, EU Launch Joint Research Projects on Marine Pollution and Green Hydrogen
content: India and the European Union have jointly launched two major research initiatives under the India-EU Trade and Technology Council (TTC), aiming to develop innovative solutions in the areas of marine pollution and green hydrogen production from waste. The projects, backed by a combined investment of â‚¹391 crore (approximately â‚¬41 million), mark a significant step in strengthening bilateral cooperation in science and technology.
author: Analysts Account
